Specifies directories to ignore in the build process for the mbed OS 5 target.

# Purpose
The file specifies a list of directories that are part of a software project. Each directory serves a specific purpose: `cmake/` contains CMake configuration files, `docs/` holds documentation, `jerry-libc/` and `jerry-main/` include source code for the JerryScript library and its main application, `targets/` contains platform-specific build configurations, `tests/` includes test cases, `third-party/` stores third-party dependencies, and `tools/` contains utility scripts or tools used in the project.
